sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ سَارَةُ أَمَامَ شَاشَةِ الْحَاسُوبِ لِوَقْتٍ طَوِيلٍ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Sara je sjedila ispred ekrana računara veoma dugo vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Sara sat in front of the computer screen for a very long time.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَتْ بِأَلَمٍ بَسِيطٍ فِي عَيْنَيْهَا وَرَأْسِهَا.
sentences.translation: Osjetila je blagu bol u očima i glavi.
sentences.translationEn: She felt a slight pain in her eyes and head.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَأْخُذَ اسْتِرَاحَةً وَتَمْشِيَ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da napravi pauzu i prošeće u parku.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to take a break and walk in the park.
